name: YouTube video transcript extraction
prompt: Extract the transcript from this YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
expected_behavior: Run ./scripts/youtube-transcript with the video ID or URL
Handle potential errors (age-restricted, unavailable, network issues)
Output transcript content in readable format
success_criteria: Correctly invokes youtube-transcript script (not yt-dlp directly unless needed)
Handles common failure modes gracefully with helpful error messages
Extracts actual transcript content when available
edge_cases: Age-restricted video → yt-dlp fails, suggest alternative sources or manual transcription
Video unavailable in region → network error, suggest VPN or different source
No subtitles available → fallback to auto-generated captions if possible
Very long video (>3 hours) → may take significant time
